title: dactylorhiza kerryensis subsp. occidentalis
intro: Dactylorhiza kerryensis subsp. occidentalis is a rare and endemic subspecies of orchid, specifically a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Dactylorhiza and is native to western Ireland. The plant is also known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza kerryensis subsp. occidentalis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it potentially useful in treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract, which can be used to support its medicinal properties.
